revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Cslist/styles.css" />{{#invoke:Cslist |makelist}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please place categories and language links on the /doc page, not here! --> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Cslist/styles.css" />{{#invoke:Cslist |makelist}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please place categories and language links on the /doc page, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Cslist]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 2503 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: <templatestyles src="Cslist/styles.css" />{{#invoke:Cslist |makelist}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please place categories and language links on the /doc page, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cslist here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cslist for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <templatestyles src="Cslist/styles.css" />{{#invoke:Cslist |makelist}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}<!-- Please place categories and language links on the /doc page, not here! --> </noinclude>
